text.title: SDD Promotion Gate Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Reviewer reads spec and 'feels good'; downstream tasks fail on missing test-plan.
spec.md absent at promotion; tasks cannot be generated.
Approval shown as 'team'; no one can defend the decision.
